name: J1939TestOutputTPCM
title: J1939TestOutputTPCM
syntax: long J1939TestOutputTPCM_RTS( pg txMsg, dword da, dword maxPacketsPerCTS, pg tpcmBuffer, dword tpcmBufferSize, dword timeout, dword options, [dword optionsArg] )
long J1939TestOutputTPCM_Data( pg txMsg, dword da, dword maxPacketsPerCTS, pg tpcmBuffer, dword tpcmBufferSize, dword delay, dword timeout, dword options )
long J1939TestOutputTPCM_Abort( pg txMsg, dword da, dword abortReason, dword options )
description: With this function the transmission of a message with the RTS/CTS transport protocol influenced. It can created errors during transmission, i.e. violate time distances or wrong sequence numbers.
First the transmission must be started with J1939TestOutputTPCM_RTS. Then the function J1939TestOutputTPCM_Data can be called until the result is 2 and the transmission was completed with EoMA.
Before calling J1939TestOutputTPCM_Data the tpcmBuffer can be modified and i.e. a wrong message number can be created.

parameters.name: txMsg
parameters.description: send this parameter group with the RTS/CTS protocol

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: timeout for CTS or EoMA response in [ms]

parameters.name: maxPacketsPerCTS
parameters.description: number of data messages, which can be requested by CTS

parameters.name: tpcmBufferSize
parameters.description: size of the CTS buffer (sould be 8)

parameters.name: tpcmBuffer
parameters.description: buffer for the tpcm message The received CTS message is copied into this buffer. When sending data messages, next sequence number and number of packets are taken from this buffer.

parameters.name: abortReason
parameters.description: Reason for abort 1: No connection free 2: No resources free 3: Timeout 255: No reason

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Bit 1: Use optionsArg as Number of Packets in RTS

parameters.name: optionsArg
parameters.description: additional parameter, depends on options, optional

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
